description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a matte black finish and a rectangular form factor. The screen is open and displays the text 'Computer Stuff' with 'Stuff' highlighted in an orange rounded rectangle, suggesting a custom or branded splash screen. The keyboard is full-sized, featuring a grid of square, light-colored keys that contrast with the dark chassis, and there is no visible trackpad. The laptop's design is minimalist, with no visible ports, stickers, or branding aside from the screen content. The hinge is subtle and not prominently visible from any angle, contributing to the sleek appearance. The overall build suggests a lightweight, portable device suitable for urban environments such as cafes, co-working spaces, or public seating areas.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a full-sized light-keyed keyboard and a screen displaying 'Computer Stuff' with an orange accent. Minimalist design with no visible ports or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with 'Computer Stuff' text and the full keyboard layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open screen, with part of the screen text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the screen, with no visible branding, ports, or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the slim profile and partial screen text.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying the text 'Computer Stuff' with a highlighted orange section.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout appears to be a standard QWERTY configuration with a full set of square keys and no visible numeric keypad or function row.
